title: Spicy Malaysian Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry recipe inspired by Malaysian cuisine, featuring savory tofu as the main protein.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the cubed tofu and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from the wok and set aside.
In the same wok, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the snow peas and cook until tender, about 2-3 minutes.
Return the cooked tofu to the wok and stir in the soy sauce, hoisin sauce, and sambal oelek.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot and garnish with chopped green onions, if desired.
